title: Scalability Agent Output Schema
description: Structured output schema for the Scalability Architecture Review Agent

bottlenecks.description: List of scalability bottlenecks identified in the architecture

scalability_score.description: Overall scalability score (0.0 = not scalable, 1.0 = optimally scalable)

confidence.description: Confidence level in this assessment (0.0 = low confidence, 1.0 = high confidence)

summary.description: Brief summary of scalability posture and key concerns (2-4 sentences)

ScalabilityBottleneck.description: A specific scalability bottleneck or constraint

title.description: Clear, concise title of the bottleneck
examples: Lack of horizontal scaling for the API tier
Single point of failure in cache layer

description.description: Detailed explanation of the bottleneck and its impact
examples: Current configuration allows maximum 100 concurrent database connections. At 50 requests/sec with 2-second query latency, this exhausts the pool.

severity.description: Severity level indicating impact on scalability

affected_components.description: List of architecture components affected by this bottleneck

title.description: Clear, concise title of the recommendation
examples: Implement connection pooling with dynamic scaling

description.description: Detailed explanation of the recommendation and its expected impact
examples: Implement PgBouncer or similar connection pooling solution to handle connection multiplexing, reducing pressure on database connection limits.

affected_components.description: Components that need to implement this recommendation

bottlenecks.title: Database connection pool exhaustion
bottlenecks.description: Current configuration allows max 100 concurrent connections. At 50 requests/sec with 2-second latency, the pool is exhausted during peak load.

bottlenecks.title: Lack of horizontal scaling for web tier
bottlenecks.description: Single instance of application server limits throughput to current hardware capacity. No load balancer or container orchestration in place.

recommendations.title: Implement connection pooling
recommendations.description: Deploy database connection pooler (PgBouncer, Pgpool-II, or cloud-native equivalent) in front of database to multiplex connections.

recommendations.title: Add horizontal scaling with container orchestration
recommendations.description: Containerize application and deploy on Kubernetes or Docker Swarm to enable dynamic scaling and load distribution.

examples.summary: Critical bottlenecks in database connectivity and application tier prevent horizontal scaling. Architecture requires connection pooling and orchestration to handle growth beyond current capacity.
